sentences.arabic: حَجَزْتُ غُرْفَةً مُنْفَرِدَةً فِي فُنْدُقٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْمَرْكَزِ.
sentences.translation: Rezervisao sam jednokrevetnu sobu u hotelu blizu centra.
sentences.translationEn: I booked a single room in a hotel near the center.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ مَوْظِفُ الِاسْتِقْبَالِ لَطِيفًا جِدًّا وَسَاعَدَنِي فِي حَمْلِ الْحَقَائِبِ.
sentences.translation: Recepcioner je bio veoma ljubazan i pomogao mi je oko prtljaga.
sentences.translationEn: The receptionist was very kind and helped me carry the bags.

sentences.translation: Soba je čista i gleda na more.
sentences.translationEn: The room is clean and overlooks the sea.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلْتُ فُطُورًا لَذِيذًا فِي مَطْعَمِ الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Jeo sam ukusan doručak u hotelskom restoranu.
sentences.translationEn: I had a delicious breakfast in the hotel restaurant.

sentences.arabic: سَأَبْقَى هُنَا لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Ovdje ću ostati samo tri dana.
sentences.translationEn: I will stay here for only three days.
